_comment: Verified 2026-07-01. Input is Quill editor (ql-editor) with aria-label='Enter a prompt for Gemini'. Send button is button[aria-label='Send message'] — only visible while text is typed. Stop button button[aria-label='Stop response'] appears during generation (thinking + web search) and disappears on completion — primary completion indicator. Clean answer text is in div.markdown.markdown-main-panel (excludes 'Gemini said' prefix and 'Searching the web' thinking text). div.response-container is fallback.
